title: Looming/receding PPS during arm movement, Experiment 1
citation: Barumerli, R., Geronazzo, M., & Cesari, P. (2026). Somatotopy-independent reduction of audio-tactile intersensory facilitation for looming sounds within the peripersonal space during arm movements execution. Scientific Reports.
notes: Template captures Experiment 1 audio-tactile block structure. Motor/static hand-status blocks are represented in notes and should be counterbalanced as separate condition blocks.

provenance.source: Methods report 15 trials for each 2 sound directions x 5 distances plus 16 catch trials per audio-tactile block.
Methods report T1-T5 as 300, 800, 1500, 2200, and 2700 ms.
